zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Helana Clarke於1496年出生在英國林可爾史爾維爾布時，她的父親Sir Richard Clark22歲，母親Catherine Throckmorton25歲。她於大約1495年與Richard Clark x在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1541年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維爾布享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維爾布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Helana Clarke于1496年出生在英国林可爾史爾維爾布时，她的父亲Sir Richard Clark22岁，母亲Catherine Throckmorton25岁。她于大约1495年与Richard Clark x在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1541年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維爾布享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維爾布。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Helana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Helana Clarke was born in 1496, in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Clark, was 22 and her mother, Catherine Throckmorton, was 25. She married Richard Clark x about 1495, in England, United Kingdom. She died in 1541, in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Helana Clarke est née en 1496, à Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Clark, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Catherine Throckmorton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Clark x environ 1495, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1541, à Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Helana Clarke 1496 in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Clark 22 und ihre Mutter Catherine Throckmorton 25. Sie hat um 1495 in England, United Kingdom Richard Clark x geheiratet. Sie starb 1541 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Helana Clarke è nata il nel 1496 nel Welbourn, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Clark, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Catherine Throckmorton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Richard Clark x circa 1495, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1541, nel Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Helana Clarkeが1496年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Clarkは22歳，母Catherine Throckmortonは25歳であった。約1495年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Clark xと結婚した。彼女は1541年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルボウルンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Helana Clarke(이)가 1496년 영국 링코실르 웰보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Clark(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Throckmorton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Clark x(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 웰보우른에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 웰보우른에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Clark x aproximadamente 1495, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1541, em Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Welbourn, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Helana Clarke родилась в 1496 г. в местности велбурн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Clark было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Throckmorton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Clark x около 1495 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1541 г. в местности велбурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности велбурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
